ddls:
CREATE TABLE "expense_types" (
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense type */,
  "expense_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the expense type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the expense type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the expense type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etf_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ETF category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the ETF category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ETF category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the ETF category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etf_expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense record */,
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF category */,
  "expense_ratio" REAL /* Expense ratio (as a percentage) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the expense ratio became effective */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the expense ratio is the current one */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the expense record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the expense record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_expenses_expense_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_type_id") REFERENCES expense_types ("expense_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_expenses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES etf_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etf_overviews" (
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ETF */,
  "etf_name" TEXT /* Name of the ETF */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the ETF */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF category */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* Date the ETF was first listed */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the ETF */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Asset class of the ETF (e.g., Equity, Fixed Income) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the ETF is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the ETF overview was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the ETF overview */,
  "last_updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the last user who updated the ETF overview */,
  "asset_size" REAL /* Total asset size of the ETF */,
  "expense_ratio_type" TEXT /* Type of expense ratio (e.g., gross, net) */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for the ETF */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures (CUSIP) for the ETF */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("etf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_overviews_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES etf_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etf_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance data */,
  "return_1d" REAL /* 1-day return */,
  "return_1w" REAL /* 1-week return */,
  "return_1m" REAL /* 1-month return */,
  "return_3m" REAL /* 3-month return */,
  "return_1y" REAL /* 1-year return */,
  "volatility_1y" REAL /* 1-year volatility */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the performance record */,
  "last_updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the last user who updated the performance record */,
  "sharpe_ratio_1y" REAL /* 1-year Sharpe ratio */,
  "alpha_1y" REAL /* 1-year alpha */,
  "beta_1y" REAL /* 1-year beta */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_performance_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etf_overviews ("etf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etf_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding record */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security held */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the security in the ETF */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the holding became effective */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the holding is the current one */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the holding record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the holding record */,
  "last_updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the last user who updated the holding record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_holdings_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etf_overviews ("etf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_holdings_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Name of the security */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Asset class of the security */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the security */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the security is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the security was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the security */,
  "last_updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the last user who updated the security */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for the security */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures (CUSIP) for the security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the ETF */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the ETF was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the ETF data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the ETF data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etf_overviews ("etf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etf_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee record */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF */,
  "management_fee" REAL /* Management fee (as a percentage) */,
  "other_expenses" REAL /* Other expenses (as a percentage) */,
  "total_expense" REAL /* Total expense (as a percentage) */,
  "fee_waiver" REAL /* Fee waiver (as a percentage) */,
  "net_expense" REAL /* Net expense (as a percentage) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the fee structure became effective */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the fee structure is the current one */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the fee record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the fee record */,
  "last_updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the last user who updated the fee record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_fees_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etf_overviews ("etf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etf_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, expense, holdings) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the report */,
  "last_updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the last user who updated the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_reports_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etf_overviews ("etf_id")
)
